templates.notes: Grieving man praying/weeping extreme close-up left. Insets: accident scene (b&w), funeral scene (green-bordered), embracing children (circle). White box text labels mid-image. Very high emotional impact tragedy cover.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก2.jpg
templates.notes: 4-panel entertainment collage. TV show logo 'โหน กระแส' (Hone Krasae) circle center. Large face lower-left dominant. Medical/hospital inset lower-right. Gossip format.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก3.jpg
templates.notes: Cave rescue dramatic cover. Main face left close-up. Green-bordered inset showing cave/rescue scene. Circle inset bottom-left with two faces. Bottom-right separate rescue person. Red text box labels. Dark cave environment colors.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก4.jpg
templates.notes: Grayscale/monochrome death announcement. Large face upper-left, small grayscale faces right column. TV channel 3 logo small. Orange monk circle inset bottom-left. White name labels on photos.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก5.jpg
templates.notes: Rescue hero story. Smiling face in cave environment upper-left dominant. Circle inset shows fireman smiling. Green-bordered inset shows cave passage scene. Lower-right shows man lying unconscious after rescue. Survival/hero narrative.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก6.jpg
templates.notes: Doctor/medical student accident tragedy. Split color/BW montage. Large yellow text bottom with white sub-text. Blue medical uniform inset top-right. Circle inset mid with portrait. Extremely high viral potential - young promising life lost.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก7.jpg
templates.notes: Financial fraud/crime story. Attractive woman large face upper-left. Cash piles top-right. Green-bordered inset shows gold shop CCTV footage. Circle inset shows cash stacks. Another woman bottom-right with gold bar. Red/gold money-crime aesthetic.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก8.jpg
templates.notes: Celebrity divorce/breakup news. Close-up face upper-left. Wedding photo top-right. Green-bordered inset shows family with kids. Circle inset shows romantic moment. Lower-right shows crying/sad face. Text labels mid.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่29พ.ค/ปก9.jpg
templates.notes: Cave rescue update. Person with oxygen mask top-left. Green-bordered inset of medical procedure. Circle inset shows man with oxygen mask zoomed. Bottom-right rescuer in cave with headlamp. Text labels show rescue limitations and rest period.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก1.jpg
templates.notes: Thai celebrity entering retreat/rehabilitation. Handsome male face upper-left dominant. House/building top-right. Green-bordered inset with sign 'เรือนธรรม'. Circle inset shows meditation group. Lower-right: walking in nature with companion. Calm positive tone.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก2.jpg
templates.notes: Celebrity medical/cancer story. Older man in yellow jacket face dominant upper-left. Hospital sign top-right. Green-bordered inset: family graduation photo. Circle inset: MRI machine. Lower-right: hospital room bed. Red text labels bottom. Empathy-driven layout.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก3.jpg
templates.notes: Farmer scam story. Two female faces top (masked and unmasked). Yellow-bordered inset shows 500 baht note with handwritten text. Circle inset shows fertilizer shop. Bottom-right shows loaded truck. Rural/agriculture theme.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก4.jpg
templates.notes: Celebrity love triangle/breakup. Female face upper-left. Couple together top-right. Couple sitting together mid-right. Circle inset shows romantic couple. No prominent text/headline but strong visual story.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก5.jpg
templates.notes: Celebrity couple and cats lifestyle. Two couple portraits top. White text label mid-right. Circle inset shows formal couple portrait. Bottom-right shows person with multiple cats. Warm lifestyle content.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่30พ.ค/ปก6.jpg
templates.notes: Drug arrest/crime story. Young man with glasses face close-up left. Messy room police search top-right. Green-bordered inset shows drug paraphernalia. Circle inset shows man with baby. Bottom-right shows smiling suspect. Complex multi-panel crime narrative.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก1.jpg
templates.notes: Cave rescue hero now sick story. Older rugged face upper-left. Top-right: group in cave with red circle highlighting specific person. Green-bordered inset: person in hospital bed. Circle inset: statue/memorial. Bottom-right: person drinking through straw in hospital. From hero to patient narrative.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก2.jpg
templates.notes: Workpoint Entertainment celebrity news. Bald/shaved head man large face lower-left. B&W historical photos top-left (with person). WorkPoint building sign top-right. Green-bordered Workpoint logo circle center. Bottom-right: two people in camouflage suits. Company drama narrative.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก3.jpg
templates.notes: Latest cave rescue update. Young face upper-left. Top-right: rescue team giving first aid (drip). Green-bordered inset: unconscious person with oxygen mask. Circle inset: two rescuers in cave hugging. Bottom-right: Laos rescuer with headlamp in tight space. Dramatic survival narrative.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก4.jpg
templates.notes: Heartwarming generosity story. Handwritten letter top-left. University building top-right. Celebrity middle-left in casual wear. Tattooed celebrity middle-right pensive. Large yellow and white bold text bottom three lines. Full emotional narrative in text. High shareability - generosity + education theme.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก5.jpg
templates.notes: Celebrity at temple/religious event. Female face upper-left with sunglasses. Red temple signboard top-right. Green-bordered inset shows another temple sign. Circle inset shows couple embracing. Bottom-right person in Thai traditional dress praying. Red dominant color - religious/cultural event.

templates.sourceFile: วันที่31พ.ค/ปก6.jpg
templates.notes: Comedy actor contract non-renewal. Older man in white t-shirt praying gesture upper-left. Multiple celebrity group photos right column. Small rectangular inset bottom-left (b&w historical). Bottom full-width bold text '34 ปีที่'. Bright/cheerful despite sad content.
